10578788.title: Men Ajl Ebni
10578788.description: Poyraz,is an infamous former policeman enjoying his retirement. He is pulled out of retirement and goes undercover to infiltrate the biggest mafia in Istanbul to save his son. During his operation he meets Aysegul and falls in love with her.

10580559.description: Fadheela, a mother of two daughters, struggles to fulfil her dream of moving to the elegant neighbourhoods of Istanbul while trying to overcome the challenges that life throws at her.

10582745.description: There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs. This crazy Quebec-based troupe uses hidden cameras and the city as its stage. Pranking unsuspecting passersby in order to film their reactions.

10583614.description: Alia works at Professor Allam's Laboratory as his assistant. She learns important information and facts related to science and technology along with various experiments.

10583626.description: Six blob-like creatures of different shapes and sizes live together. Even though they look different, together they overcome everyday situations with each other's help, despite their contrasting personalities.
